-- Document in schema.sql:
CREATE INDEX no_parent_date_overlap ON public.student_parents USING gist (student_id, parent_id, daterange(valid_from, valid_to, '[]'::text));

issue: Index exists in live DB but not in schema.sql
live_state: CREATE INDEX no_academic_year_overlap ON public.academic_years USING gist (daterange(start_date, end_date, '[]'::text)) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

-- Document in schema.sql:

issue: View definition differs (may be whitespace only)
schema_state:
SELECT 
    id, student_id, amount_due, amount_paid, discount, 
    status, du
live_state:
SELECT id,
    student_id,
    amount_due,
    amount_paid,
    discount,
    s
recommended_fix:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW fee_installments AS SELECT 
    id, student_id, amount_due, amount_paid, discount, 
    status, due_date, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM student_fees;

issue: View definition differs (may be whitespace only)
schema_state:
SELECT 
    c.name as class_name, 
    s.name as section_name, 
    p.display
live_state:
SELECT c.name AS class_name,
    s.name AS section_name,
    p.display_name AS
recommended_fix:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW debug_class_teachers AS SELECT 
    c.name as class_name, 
    s.name as section_name, 
    p.display_name as teacher_name,
    ay.code as academic_year
FROM class_sections cs
JOIN classes c ON cs.class_id = c.id
JOIN sections s ON cs.section_id = s.id
JOIN academic_years ay ON cs.academic_year_id = ay.id
LEFT JOIN staff st ON cs.class_teacher_id = st.id
LEFT JOIN persons p ON st.person_id = p.id;

issue: View definition differs (may be whitespace only)
schema_state:
SELECT 
    r.code as role,
    STRING_AGG(p.code, ', ') as permissions
FROM
live_state:
SELECT r.code AS role,
    string_agg((p.code)::text, ', '::text) AS permission
recommended_fix:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW debug_role_permissions AS SELECT 
    r.code as role,
    STRING_AGG(p.code, ', ') as permissions
FROM roles r
LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
LEFT JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.id
GROUP BY r.code;
